description: italki is an online language learning marketplace where learners book live 1-on-1 and group lessons with teachers across many languages. It also offers learning tools, community content, and teacher onboarding.
summary: italki exposes an OAuth-protected HTTP API at `https://api.italki.com` and a public MCP server at `https://www.italki.com/saiph/mcp`; no GraphQL API or CLI was found.
